title: Cloud Chaos Monkey — Input Schema
description: Input parameters for the cloud-chaos-monkey babysitter process.

provider.description: Cloud provider. Determines CLI hints, service naming, and provider-aware agent prompts.

projectIdentifier.description: Cloud project or account identifier (GCP project ID, AWS account ID, Azure subscription ID).

region.description: Primary deployment region where services are running (e.g., 'us-central1', 'us-east-1', 'westeurope').

chaosPrefix.description: Prefix for shadow resource names. Shadow services are named '{chaosPrefix}-{originalName}'.

faultDomains.description: Fault domains to test. Each domain generates targeted chaos scenarios.

executionMode.description: How chaos scenarios are executed. 'hybrid' mixes automated and manual steps. 'automated' runs all scenarios programmatically. 'manual' generates runbooks for human execution.

autoAbort.description: Automatically abort if error rate exceeds threshold.

maxErrorRatePercent.description: Maximum error rate percentage before auto-abort triggers.

rollbackTimeoutSeconds.description: Maximum seconds to wait for rollback completion.

healthCheckConfig.description: Configuration for health check probes during chaos execution.

sampleCount.description: Number of health check samples to take per probe.

timeoutSeconds.description: Timeout in seconds for each health check probe.

reportOutputPath.description: File path where the interactive HTML report will be written.

reportTheme.description: Color theme for the generated HTML report.
